ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jun-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jazmine Capulong appeared by zoom for Matthew Chandler (petitioner).

The court noted that a corrected inventory and appraisal has been filed and that a petition is pending in the e-file queue. The court also informed Mrs. Capulong that her petition will most likely be rejected due to a common error of parties indicating the status hearing date as the hearing date on the petition. Mrs. Capulong stated that she will refile the petition today. Status on close of estate is continued to June 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jazmine Capulong appeared by zoom for Matthew Chandler (petitioner).
Jennifer Jaynes appeared by zoom for Joan Carlson.

The court stated that it is disappointed to not see a filing, noted that this matter has been on calendar a number of times and recalled what was said at the last hearings. Mrs. Capulong stated that she sent some documents to Mrs. Jaynes for review this morning and requested more time for Mrs. Jaynes to review them and to allow time to make any corrections. Mrs. Capulong also stated that she had been ill and spoke of her health issues. Mrs. Jaynes stated that she received a draft of the petition this morning, that it is concerning because there has been a 37% reduction in the value of the estate and that she hopes it's an error in the accounting. The court noted that suspension of the administrator may cause greater delay. Status on close of estate is continued to June 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To May-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Palpallatoc appeared by zoom for Matthew Chandler (petitioner/administrator).
Jennifer Jaynes appeared by zoom for Joan Carlson.

Mrs. Palpallatoc requested an additional 30-day continuance on behalf of her client stating that the petitioner needs to address the investment income, that the administrator is in communication with the IRS regarding the request for abatement, that they need time for Mrs. Carlson to review the paper work and waive an accounting, and that they need to address the sale of the stock shares and they may be requesting a reserve. Mrs. Jaynes expressed concern about her constantly needing to tell them what they need to do, about dates and deadlines not being met, stated that she has not been provided with a draft of the petition and raised the issue of removal of the administrator. Status on close of estate is continued to May 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Palpallatoc that it may consider suspension and encouraged her to share a draft of the petition for final distribution with Mrs. Jaynes.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Lawrence Adamsky, Esq., specially appearing for Jazmine Capulong, Esq., for Matthew Chandler, Administrator.
Jennifer Jaynes, Esq., for Joan Carlson, Requestor.

At the outset, the court states that at the previous calling, the court was promised a petition, and that none has been filed. Mr. Adamsky reports that Ms. Capulong has been ill and is requesting a three-week continuance. Ms. Jaynes reminds the court of the previous delays with this matter but acknowledges that Ms. Capulong has advised her of her illness.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-08-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jazmine Capulong appeared via zoom for Matthew Chandler (petitioner).
Jennifer Jaynes appeared via zoom for Joan Giordano Carlson (beneficiary).

Ms. Capulong stated that she is almost done with the final distribution and would need a continuance to complete the filing. Status of closing of estate is continued to January 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wan: Not reported.
